title: Golf Course Road vs Extension Road 2026
excerpt: Gurgaon's luxury real estate market continues to grow in 2026. However, serious investors and end-users often face a challenging choice between these two prime corridors...
content: Gurgaon's luxury real estate market continues to grow in 2026. However, serious investors and end-users often face a challenging choice between Golf Course Road and Extension Road. Golf Course Road is the established premium corridor with mature infrastructure, top schools, hospitals, and five-star hotels. Extension Road, on the other hand, offers newer developments at relatively better price points with strong appreciation potential. For end-users seeking ready possession and established neighbourhood amenities, Golf Course Road remains unbeatable. For investors with a 3–5 year horizon, Extension Road offers superior ROI potential driven by upcoming metro connectivity and commercial development.
author: Greenaria Team

title: How to Choose the Right Property for Investment in 2026
excerpt: Real estate remains one of the most trusted wealth-building assets. However, the market in 2026 is different from previous years and requires careful analysis...
content: Real estate remains one of the most trusted wealth-building assets. However, the market in 2026 is different from previous years. Rising interest rates, evolving buyer preferences, and new micro-markets have changed the investment landscape. Key factors to evaluate: Location fundamentals (metro connectivity, social infrastructure, employment hubs), Developer credibility (track record, RERA compliance, delivery history), Rental yield potential (typically 2.5–4% in Gurgaon), Exit liquidity (ease of resale in the chosen micro-market), and Legal clarity (clear title, approved layout, encumbrance-free).
author: Greenaria Team

title: Is Dwarka Expressway a Safe Investment in 2026?
excerpt: The Gurgaon real estate market is evolving fast. One location that continues to attract serious attention is Dwarka Expressway...
content: The Gurgaon real estate market is evolving fast. One location that continues to attract serious attention is Dwarka Expressway. With the expressway fully operational and metro connectivity now confirmed, prices in this corridor have appreciated 18–22% over the last 18 months. Several premium projects by DLF, M3M, Signature Global, and Sobha are under construction here. The proximity to IGI Airport (25 min), Delhi border, and Gurgaon city centre makes it a strong long-term bet. However, investors should carefully verify RERA registration, delivery timelines, and choose projects from developers with proven delivery history.
author: Greenaria Team
